_note: WP04 evidence envelope. Captured pre-merge-of-this-mission as a baseline. Post-merge SonarCloud scan will update this file once CI completes its analysis of the merged runtime-extraction branch. The `pre_merge_baseline` block is the Sonar response at the mission's approval point; the `post_merge_actual` block is populated by the post-merge CI step.

expected_post_merge.comment: Targets from spec.md §Success Criteria SC-001 through SC-005. Applies once the merged mission branch is re-scanned by Sonar.
expected_post_merge.SC_003_tests_pass_unchanged: Confirmed pre-merge: 155 focused tests green; no test-side edits (see WP02 status.events.jsonl)
expected_post_merge.SC_005_pytestarch_layer_rules_pass: Gateway imports from doctrine only; no runtime -> doctrine import introduced

wp_commits.reason: Trigger check: home.py was never in Sonar's hotlist; duplicated_lines < 100 threshold

local_verification_pre_merge.runtime_resolver_expected_after_merge: <= 60 (target), 128 actual — 180 lines saved vs pre-refactor 308; deviation kept to preserve LEGACY-tier deprecation warning behaviour via legacy_warn_hook

post_merge_actual._pending: Populate after merge + CI SonarCloud scan completes.
